definitions.text: Distinguished by a unique, particular, or unusual quality.
examples: a special episode of a television series

definitions.text: Of particular value or interest; dear; beloved.
examples: his special friend of many years, Bill

definitions.text: Of or related to unconventional warfare.
A reduction in consumer cost (usually for a limited time) for items or services rendered; the thing thus sold.
examples: We're running a special on turkey for Thanksgiving.
I didn't have much money, so I bought the special.

definitions.text: A meal offered only at a certain time by a restaurant, not as a standing fixture of the menu; often, one of a rotation of meals systematically offered for a lower price; also often a dish at a nondiscounted price that is seasonal or otherwise exciting or unusual.
examples: Today's dinner special is wild salmon, which we don't normally get a chance to offer.
The Tuesday lunch special is our tuna melt on rye.

definitions.text: Unusual or exceptional episode of a series.
examples: Did you see the Christmas special?
